seoTitle: Burrum River vs Burrum Town — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burrum River and Burrum Town. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burrum River vs Burrum Town: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burrum River and Burrum Town.
heading: Burrum River vs Burrum Town — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burrum River, Queensland and Burrum Town, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrum Town has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Burrum River (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burrum River or Burrum Town safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burrum River has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Burrum Town scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burrum River scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Burrum Town scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burrum River or Burrum Town?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrum Town has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
